mapper.select: SELECT * FROM food_categories ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id where food_categories.status=1
mapper.update: UPDATE food_categories f SET -- 点赞数：查 likes 表，target_type=2 like_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_type = 2 AND l.target_id = f.id ), collect_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM collections c WHERE c.target_type = 2 AND c.target_id = f.id ), comment_count = ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM comments cm WHERE cm.target_type = 2 AND cm.target_id = f.id AND cm.status = 1 )
